config.recruitKey.name: Recruit/Dismiss Key
config.recruitKey.description: The main action key to use when recruiting or dismissing NPCs
config.manualTaskKey.name: Manual Command Key
config.manualTaskKey.description: Press this key while aiming at an object to command a squad member to interact with it.
config.useSquadInventory.name: Use Squad Inventory
config.useSquadInventory.description: When NPCs gather items, they will place it on a special Squad Inventory. If disabled, they will put it directly in the player's inventory if possible.
config.useVanillaDialogueUI.name: Use Vanilla Dialogue UI
config.useVanillaDialogueUI.description: Replaces the custom squad menu with Stardew Valley's native dialogue UI. Useful if you're having issues with the custom UI.
config.openSquadInventoryKey.name: Open Squad Inventory Key
config.openSquadInventoryKey.description: The key used to open the shared squad inventory.
config.tasksToggleKey.name: Toggle Tasks Key
config.tasksToggleKey.description: Press this key to toggle whether squad members perform tasks or only follow you.
config.friendshipRequirement.name: Friendship Requirement
config.friendshipRequirement.description: The number of hearts required to recruit an NPC. Spouses can always be recruited.
config.friendshipPointsPerHour.name: Friendship Gain Per Hour
config.friendshipPointsPerHour.descripti: The amount of friendship gained for each in-game hour spent with a recruited squad member.
config.maxSquadSize.name: Max Squad Size
config.maxSquadSize.description: The maximum number of followers you can have in your squad at one time. Be warned that increasing this number will make the mod overpowered (and may come to a performance cost at some point)!
config.recruitAllNpcs.name: Recruit Any NPC
config.recruitAllNpcs.description: If enabled, allows recruiting any NPC, not just friendable ones. WARNING: This may cause unexpected behavior with certain NPCs.
config.disableInteraction.name: Disable Squad Member Interaction
config.disableInteraction.description: Sets when talking to or gifting squad members should be prevented.
config.disableTrashRummagingReaction.des: Sets which squad members should not react negatively when you dig through trash cans.
config.enableCommunication.name: Enable Ambient Dialogue
config.enableCommunication.description: If enabled, squad members will show dialogue bubbles or make sounds.
config.dialogueCooldownSeconds.name: Dialogue Cooldown (seconds)
config.dialogueCooldownSeconds.descripti: The minimum time in seconds between dialogue bubbles for each squad member. Set to 0 to disable cooldown.
config.enableIdleAnimations.name: Enable Idle Animations
config.enableIdleAnimations.description: If enabled, squad members will perform idle animations when standing still while following you.
config.enableGathering.name: Auto-Gather Debris
config.enableGathering.description: If enabled, squad members will automatically pick up loose items and debris from the ground.
config.enabledTasks.name: Task Modes
config.attackingMode.name: Attacking
config.attackingMode.description: How squad members attack: Disabled (never), Mimicking (only when you fight), or Autonomous (automatically attack nearby monsters).
config.harvestingMode.name: Harvesting
config.harvestingMode.description: How squad members harvest: Disabled (never), Mimicking (only when you harvest), or Autonomous (automatically harvest nearby mature crops).
config.protectBeehouseFlowers.name: Protect Beehouse Flowers
config.protectBeehouseFlowers.descriptio: Number of tiles around beehouses where flowers are protected from harvesting. Set to 0 to disable protection. Default is 5.
config.foragingMode.name: Foraging
config.foragingMode.description: How squad members forage: Disabled (never) or Autonomous (automatically pick up forage items).
config.lumberingMode.name: Lumbering
config.lumberingMode.description: How squad members chop: Disabled (never), Mimicking (only when you chop), or Autonomous (automatically clear twigs, chop trees when you do).
config.miningMode.name: Mining
config.miningMode.description: How squad members mine: Disabled (never), Mimicking (only when you mine), or Autonomous (automatically break nearby rocks).
config.wateringMode.name: Watering
config.wateringMode.description: How squad members water crops: Disabled (never), Mimicking (only when you water), or Autonomous (automatically water dry soil).
config.fishingMode.name: Fishing
config.fishingMode.description: How squad members fish: Disabled (never) or Mimicking (only when you fish).
config.pettingMode.name: Petting
config.pettingMode.description: How squad members pet animals: Disabled (never), Mimicking (only when you're petting animals), or Autonomous (automatically pet unpetted animals).
config.shearingMode.name: Shearing
config.shearingMode.description: How squad members shear sheep: Disabled (never), Mimicking (only when you shear), or Autonomous (automatically shear nearby ready animals).
config.milkingMode.name: Milking
config.milkingMode.description: How squad members milk cows and goats: Disabled (never), Mimicking (only when you milk), or Autonomous (automatically milk nearby ready animals).
config.enableRiding.name: Enable Horse Riding
config.enableRiding.description: If enabled, the first squad member will ride the horse behind you when you mount up.
config.enableSitting.name: Enable Sitting
config.enableSitting.description: If enabled, squad members will sit on furniture when you do.
config.enableSittingLegRendering.name: (EXPERIMENTAL) Enable Sitting Leg Rendering
config.enableSittingLegRendering.descrip: If enabled, NPCs will use leg sprite manipulation when sitting (legs rotated for side views, sprite trimmed for proper positioning). Looks pretty hacky, but I'm putting it out here to try.
commands.noFollower: You have no one in your squad to command.
recruitment.onlyOneFollower: You can only have one follower at a time.
recruitment.festival_block: You cannot recruit NPCs during a festival.
squad.inventory.title: Squad Inventory
dialogue.recruit.spouse.generic.1: Of course, {{endearment}}. I'll go wherever you go.
dialogue.recruit.spouse.generic.2: Anywhere with you, {{endearment}}. Let's get moving.
dialogue.recruit.spouse.generic.3: I'd love to! What are we doing today?
dialogue.recruit.spouse.generic.4: Just say the word and I'm there, {{endearment}}.
dialogue.recruit.spouse.generic.5: Always. I'll be right behind you.
dialogue.recruit.spouse.generic.night.1: Staying out late, {{endearment}}? I'm with you.
dialogue.dismiss.spouse.generic.1: Okay, {{endearment}}. I'll see you back at home.
dialogue.dismiss.spouse.generic.3: I'll start heading home. Don't be too late!
dialogue.dismiss.spouse.generic.4: Let me know when you're done. See you soon, {{endearment}}.
dialogue.dismiss.spouse.generic.5: Was that all? I'll meet you at the farmhouse, then.
dialogue.dismiss.spouse.generic.night.1: I'm ready for bed. See you at home, {{endearment}}.
dialogue.idle.spouse.generic.generic.1: I love spending the day with you, {{endearment}}.
dialogue.idle.spouse.generic.generic.2: It feels like we can take on the world together.
dialogue.idle.spouse.generic.generic.3: Just being with you is all I need, {{endearment}}.
dialogue.idle.spouse.generic.generic.4: Every day is an adventure with you.
dialogue.idle.spouse.generic.generic.5: What a perfect day to spend together, isn't it?
dialogue.idle.spouse.generic.generic.nig: I love spending my evenings with you like this.
Just you, me, and the moonlight, {{endearment}}.
dialogue.attacking.spouse.generic.generi: Don't you dare come near them!
I won't let you hurt them!
dialogue.watering.spouse.generic.generic: Helping out on the farm for my favorite farmer!
Our farm is going to be so beautiful, {{endearment}}.
Teamwork makes the dream work, right {{endearment}}?
It's no trouble at all. Anything for you.
This is much more fun when we do it together.
dialogue.lumbering.spouse.generic.generi: Let me get that for you, {{endearment}}.
We'll have this cleared in no time!
We're so efficient when we work together.
Two axes are better than one!
dialogue.mining.spouse.generic.generic.1: I can handle this rock for you.
dialogue.mining.spouse.generic.generic.2: Anything to make our farm better!
dialogue.mining.spouse.generic.generic.3: You found a good spot to mine, {{endearment}}.
dialogue.mining.spouse.generic.generic.4: We need all the stone we can get!
dialogue.mining.spouse.generic.generic.5: This reminds me of our old adventures in the mines.
dialogue.harvesting.spouse.generic.gener: Our hard work is paying off, {{endearment}}.
This is going to taste delicious tonight.
I'm so proud of our farm.
This one looks perfect! I'll grab it.
It's so much more fun doing this together.
dialogue.foraging.spouse.generic.generic: What a lovely day for a walk... and a snack!
It feels like we're on a little treasure hunt together.
Look what I found! Should we keep it?
The best things in life are free... and shared with you.
It's so peaceful being out here with you, {{endearment}}.
I could fish with you all day.
It's moments like these that I cherish the most.
Just you, me, and the water. Perfect.
I don't mind the wait when I'm with you.
dialogue.fishing_caught.spouse.generic.g: Look! We should cook this for dinner.
Ha! All that patience paid off!
They seem so happy when we take care of them.
Taking care of them together makes it even better.
Look how much they love us, {{endearment}}.
These animals are part of our family now.
dialogue.recruit.generic.1: I'd be happy to. Lead the way, {{name}}!
dialogue.recruit.generic.2: Sure, I could use a change of scenery. Let's go!
dialogue.recruit.generic.4: You can count on my help, {{name}}.
dialogue.recruit.generic.5: Alright, I'll follow you. What's the plan?
dialogue.recruit.generic.night.1: Isn't it a bit late for an adventure, {{name}}? Oh, alright then!
dialogue.recruit.generic.night.2: At this hour? Well... okay, let's go.
dialogue.dismiss.generic.1: Alright, see you back in town!
dialogue.dismiss.generic.2: It was fun! Let me know if you need me again.
dialogue.dismiss.generic.4: Time for me to go. Until next time!
dialogue.dismiss.generic.5: Okay, take care of yourself out there.
dialogue.dismiss.generic.night.1: I should probably be getting home. Good night!
dialogue.dismiss.generic.night.2: Alright, I'm heading to bed. See you tomorrow.
dialogue.friendship_too_low.generic.1: Oh... I'm not sure I know you well enough for that, {{name}}.
dialogue.friendship_too_low.generic.2: I'd rather hang out with people I'm closer with. Sorry.
dialogue.friendship_too_low.generic.3: Let's get to know each other a bit better first, okay?
dialogue.friendship_too_low.generic.4: I appreciate the offer, but I'm not comfortable with that yet.
dialogue.recruitment_refusal.generic.1: Sorry, I'm busy right now. Maybe another time?
dialogue.idle.generic.generic.4: I wonder what the rest of the day holds.
dialogue.idle.generic.generic.5: Take your time. I'm not in a rush.
dialogue.idle.generic.generic.night.2: I'm starting to get a little sleepy.
dialogue.idle.generic.Farm.2: The fresh air out here is wonderful.
dialogue.idle.generic.Farm.3: All this open space is really peaceful.
dialogue.idle.generic.Farm.4: Those crops are coming along nicely.
dialogue.idle.generic.Farm.5: I like the way you organized things here.
dialogue.idle.generic.Farm.night.1: The farm is so quiet at night. It's nice.
dialogue.idle.generic.MineShaft.1: It's so dark in here... let's stick together.
dialogue.idle.generic.MineShaft.2: Did you hear that? Stay alert.
dialogue.idle.generic.MineShaft.4: I hope we find some valuable minerals.
dialogue.idle.generic.MineShaft.5: This place gives me the creeps.
dialogue.idle.generic.VolcanoDungeon.1: Wow, you can really feel the heat!
dialogue.idle.generic.VolcanoDungeon.2: Don't get too close to the lava.
dialogue.idle.generic.VolcanoDungeon.3: This place is intense. What kind of monsters live here?
dialogue.idle.generic.VolcanoDungeon.5: I bet there's some rare stuff in a place like this.
dialogue.attacking.generic.MineShaft.1: Back to the shadows with you!
dialogue.attacking.generic.MineShaft.5: Stay in the dark where you belong!
dialogue.watering.generic.generic.2: Plants need water to grow big and strong!
dialogue.watering.generic.generic.3: A little bit of water should do the trick.
dialogue.watering.generic.Farm.1: Just doing my part for the farm.
dialogue.watering.generic.Farm.2: These will be ready for harvest in no time.
dialogue.watering.generic.Farm.3: We make a pretty good team, don't we?
dialogue.watering.generic.Farm.4: Gotta keep the farm looking its best.
dialogue.lumbering.generic.generic.3: I should put my back into it!
dialogue.harvesting.generic.generic.1: Look at the size of this one!
dialogue.harvesting.generic.generic.2: This looks ripe for the picking.
dialogue.harvesting.generic.generic.3: That's another one for the basket.
dialogue.harvesting.generic.generic.4: The harvest looks good this year.
dialogue.harvesting.generic.generic.5: It's satisfying to see the fruits of your labor.
dialogue.foraging.generic.generic.2: Someone missed this one. Good for us!
dialogue.foraging.generic.generic.4: You have to keep your eyes peeled for these.
dialogue.foraging.generic.generic.5: Let's see what else we can find around here.
dialogue.fishing_waiting.generic.generic: The water looks so peaceful today.
I think I felt a nibble!
Fishing is so relaxing, don't you think?
Look at the size of this one!
dialogue.petting.generic.generic.1: Who's a good friend? You are!
dialogue.petting.generic.generic.3: Animals can really sense when you care about them.
dialogue.petting.generic.generic.5: A little love goes a long way with these guys.
